category_sources: source_facts.description says C++ speech software library; official CSTR page describes Edinburgh Speech Tools as C++ classes, functions, and programs for speech processing.
display_name_sources: Official CSTR page title is The Edinburgh Speech Tools Library; source_facts.name is speech-tools.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official Festvox docs page; official CSTR page has a Documentation section and full manual link.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CSTR page says the tools are distributed in full source form via Festival download, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official CSTR page describes waveform, LPC, Cepstra, F0, labels, ngrams, and speech recognition support.
